## Recent changes

- 2026-07-19 maintenance drained `memory/inbox/2026-07-19-s6a-prefill-warm-start-bringup.md` into the new topic `memory/topics/s6a-prefill-warm-start.md` and `plan.md`.
- **M0/S6a-prefill warm-start (`START_CHUNKS` prefix reuse) is verified byte-identical in sim and on real WSE-3.** It had never executed before this session; a fabric deadlock masked everything downstream. Three defects fixed (odd-extent fabric `@mov16` deadlock, `ht_head` hardcoded chunk slot, two host `start_chunk` assumptions); none are committed yet.
- Durable constraint: every per-column x-chain payload must be EVEN — an odd-extent async `fabin → fabout` `@mov16` silently deadlocks WSE-3 (skill: `csl-odd-extent-fabric-forward-hang`).
- Open caveat for Le: prefill prefix-reuse saving tracks **(k/n)², not k/n**, so reuse has strong diminishing returns — but the grid is **mock scale** (dim=64) and must be re-measured on real-dim configs before it informs any decision.
- 2026-07-18 maintenance drained `memory/inbox/2026-07-16-fabric-no-keyed-routing-orchestration.md` into `memory/topics/csl-control-payload-mechanisms.md` and `plan.md`.
- Durable fabric framing: WSE has no keyed/content routing; KV gather and related ML movements must be expressed as static topology plus deterministic stepper/rotation/chain orchestration, or handled by host logic. Added a follow-up to discuss KV-reuse/tiering implications.
- Moved four generated all-kernel state-machine aggregate indexes from `memory/inbox/` to `assets/kernel-algo/` and updated `memory/topics/qwen3-kernel-analysis-atlas.md` so generated references no longer appear as un-drained captures.
- 2026-07-16 maintenance drained `memory/inbox/2026-07-13-kv-management-abstraction-design.md` into `memory/topics/s6a-decode-kv-retain.md`, `memory/topics/standalone-vs-integrated-kernel-parity.md`, and `plan.md`.
- Durable abstraction decision: KV compute is shared, but retain cannot be abstracted into integrated kernels until their runtime multi-round lifecycle is ported in S4/S5; S6 stays standalone-first and seam-isolated. Prefill retain is viable as a `start_chunk` warm-start; force-decode remains an M2 mechanism.
- Prior 2026-07-15 state remains: M0/S6a-decode was sim-verified and captured in `memory/topics/s6a-decode-kv-retain.md`; source of truth is in-repo `milestones/M0-reuse-foundation.md § S6a` + `PROGRESS.md`.
